haiku:
Smoky scents arise,
Tender brisket, spice embraced,
Feast of warmth and cheer.
Happy #NationalBrisketDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Grilled patties sizzle,
Golden buns embrace the warmth,
Ketchup rivers flow.
Happy #NationalHamburgerDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden sunbeams glow,
Crisp leaves dance on warm breezes,
Cheers rise, hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayIanFleming from @ClamBakeSanta
